chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 614 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.11.2025. Mr. Ghulam Shabir Mari, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State alongwith DSP Ashfaque Ahmed Bajwa SDPO Sakran, Inspector Hussain Ali SHO Khadhar and Nawaz Ali DSP Legal on behalf of SSP Shaheed Benazirabad. = Today the applicant Sikandar Ali who was the proposed accused No.2 in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.2914/2025 has appeared in person and submits through his counsel that he no longer wishes to challenge the impugned order dated 03.09.2025 passed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace. Counsel for the applicant contends that the applicant No.2 Sikandar Ali and the respondent No.3 Ghulam Ali who is also present in Court today have reconciled the matter hence this Criminal Miscellaneous Application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. The show cause notice issued to the SSP Shaheed Benazirabad is hereby recalled and the above title Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed in the above terms. JUDGE Tufail
